text: Namaste, welcome to VCare Techs, kaise ho aap? Can you please tell me your name?
Namaste, welcome to VCare Techs, aapka naam kya hai?
Accha Kishan ji, aapko kis tarah ka service chahiye - sales automation, support automation, ya kuch aur?
Humare paas AI-powered sales and support automation services hain, aapko kismein interest hai? Budget kitna hai aapka?
Bahut accha, 5 crore ka budget hai, aur aapka project kab tak complete karna hai, koi specific timeline hai?
Theek hai Kisha ji, hum aapse phir baat karenge, dhanyavad for considering VCare Techs, have a great day!
